title: CLAM mitochondrial genome pipeline
description: Schema for launching the CLAM mitochondrial genome pipeline from Seqera.

input.description: Input FASTQ pair glob or BAM path/glob. FASTQ example: /path/to/data/*_{R1,R2}.fastq.gz. BAM example: /path/to/data/*.bam

input_type.description: Type of input files supplied to the pipeline.

analysis_mode.description: CLAM analysis mode. Use wgs_numt_correction for the full WGS workflow with GRCh38 nuclear remapping and MitoScape NUMT correction, or rcrs_only for the short mitochondrial-only workflow.

genome.description: Legacy parameter. Prefer analysis_mode. Accepted legacy aliases include GRCh38/hg38 for wgs_numt_correction and rCRS for rcrs_only.

outdir.description: The output directory where pipeline results will be saved.

clam_container.description: Container image used for CLAM core processes.

mutect2_container.description: Container image used for the Mutect2 process.

mitoscape_container.description: Container image used for the MitoScape process.

classifier.description: Path to the MitoScape classifier jar inside the MitoScape container.

mitomap.description: Path to the MitoScape mitomap linkage disequilibrium resource.

model.description: Path to the MitoScape classifier model.

annotation.description: Path to the mutserve rCRS annotation file.
